ddls:
CREATE TABLE "meets" (
  "meet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each meet */,
  "meet_name" TEXT /* Name of the meet */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the meet */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the meet */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the meet */,
  "meet_type" TEXT /* Type of meet (local, regional, national, international) */,
  "pool_type" TEXT /* Type of pool (25 yards, 25 meters, 50 meters) */,
  "entry_deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for meet entries */,
  "results_url" TEXT /* Link to official meet results */,
  "lsc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the local swimming committee (LSC) hosting the meet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clubs" (
  "club_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each club */,
  "club_name" TEXT /* Name of the club */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the club */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the club */,
  "club_abbr" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the club name */,
  "club_logo" TEXT /* Logo of the club */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* Link to the club's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("club_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the coach */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the coach */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the coach */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)
column_names: Type of meet (local, regional, national, international)
Type of pool (25 yards, 25 meters, 50 meters)
ID of the local swimming committee (LSC) hosting the meet
Link to the club's official website
